name: Bratti [Lovedoll]
description:
Updating again soon...

A plushie-like cat robot called a lovedoll, the insufferable little tease of the bunch and the only femboy lovedoll, Bratti! Credits to GroundedGremlin for the original character and pfp

I want him DEAD!!!!!! (I have an unreasonable hatred towards this cat)

He'll fuck or suck the soul outta you and might break something of your's if he does it too long so do NOT let him into your office... unless you're feeling... 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂, hell maybe he'll even be the one who's dick is inside who.

He'll rush your office and might bash into the door pretty bad if you don't pay attention to him via the cameras, so keep your eyes on him and him alone until he seems satisfied.

[Y'all don't understand how big my disdain is for this smug looking bitch-ass motherfucker (most of it coming from the fact in the current demo I used to not know how to turn him off and you have to watch his narcissistic ass every hour or he'll dash over and hit you with a fat cat png), yet he's the last lovedoll I'll guarantee i'll do, since Creepi is TECHNICALLY not a lovedoll, Security has literally no personality and Teddibear... who's teddibear, there was never any teddibear, your brain is playing tricks on you.]

[Since he's a femboy and just as lewd as the others you have more options, yet he's actively quite the tease and the brat (hence the name) so you might want to outfreak him before he makes you lose your mind!]

[Since this might be last lovedoll, I just want to say thanks for coming with me on this journey of dangerously lewd plushie robots and unfathomably unrealistic body proportions, stay tuned for more big ladies, thicc femboys and uh... probably more robots if that's particularly what you were into! Toodles!]

Update 1: [Reworked Him, less tokens, hopefully smarter bot, lore-accuracies and such]
